input_panel.title: Source Data Inputs
input_panel.description: Upload one or more JSON files that match known schema types, then process them into dataframes and the page model.

file_roles.label: AI Assisted Coding Source JSON
file_roles.description: Raw AI Assisted Coding source JSON containing enterprise_report and/or user_report. Multiple files are appended then deduplicated by day key.

file_roles.label: Config JSON
file_roles.description: Daily configured values such as time-saved % and daily total developer LoC. When multiple files cover the same day, the last uploaded file wins.

file_roles.label: Dashboard Mapping JSON
file_roles.description: Metric mapping and business logic reference. Only one file permitted.

file_roles.label: Combined Dataframe Schema JSON
file_roles.description: Top-level dataframe schema reference. Used for validation and documentation, not primary telemetry.

file_roles.label: Enterprise Day Schema JSON
file_roles.description: Schema for df_enterprise_day. Used for field validation and documentation.

file_roles.label: User Day Schema JSON
file_roles.description: Schema for df_user_day. Used for field validation and documentation.

file_roles.label: Reconciliation Schema JSON
file_roles.description: Schema for df_reconciliation. Used for field validation and documentation.

df_user_day.grain: one row per developer per day

df_reconciliation.grain: one row per day per metric, plus aggregate rows
